thinking:
**Expanding Test Types**

I'm currently updating the grouping logic in `CandidateDashboard.tsx`. I've added the new test type, `MBTI`, to the test grouping types, broadening the scope from just 'DISC' and 'QUESTIONS'. Now, I will write the `getMbtiStatusFor` helper function.


**Integrating MBTI Logic**

I've crafted `getMbtiStatusForApp`, a function to determine MBTI test status, handling 'PENDING', 'COMPLETED', and 'NONE' states with JSON parsing. This is integrated into the candidate iteration process, categorizing candidates into 'pendingTests' and 'completedTests' arrays accordingly. My next focus is on integrating MBTI state conditionals—'taking', 'initial', and 'completed'—into the rendering logic of `CandidateDashboard.tsx`, ensuring a premium visualization experience.


**Designing MBTI Interface**

I'm now designing the user interface for the 'taking' state of the MBTI test. I'm focusing on a clean, intuitive layout for each of the 8 stages, with 8 questions per stage. Each question will present options A and B, requiring the user to rate each with a score from 0 to 3. I'm planning to use a two-column layout with buttons for rating, and I'll include clear instructions. Validation is critical; all questions on a page must be answered before moving to the next stage.


**Visualizing MBTI Results**

I'm now focused on the display of MBTI results. I'm aiming for a visually appealing profile card that showcases the 4-letter type, its corresponding title from `MBTI_PROFILES`, and the personality category. This includes a prominent card with the correct color, a brief personality description, key characteristics as tags, strengths and weaknesses lists, and an elegant graph to visualize dimension percentages. For the graph, I'm using calculated percentages (E/I, S/N, T/F, J/P) and considering different display options like dual bars or a horizontal bar with a central division. I'll also add a "Back to Tests" button. I'm updating my `task.md` file using the `replace_file_content` utility to reflect progress.

args.Description: "Marcar as tarefas iniciais de atualização dos helpers de dados e início da interface do candidato como em progresso no task.md"
args.Instruction: "Marcar as primeiras tarefas como em progresso no checklist do task.md"
args.ReplacementContent:
"# Checklist de Implementação - Teste de Personalidade MBTI

- `[x]` Atualizar helpers de parseamento e serialização de `candidate_phone` em [CandidateDashboard.tsx](file:///C:/Users/paulo/antigravity/Colaborh---Conectando-Talentos/src/components/CandidateDashboard.tsx) e [CompanyDashboard.tsx](file:///C:/Users/paulo/antigravity/Colaborh---Conectando-Talentos/src/components/CompanyDashboard.tsx) para suportar a tag `===MBTI===`
- `[x]` Cadastrar a constante com as 64 perguntas do MBTI (com alternativas A e B e dimensões mapeadas) e os 16 perfis em [CandidateDashboard.tsx](file:///C:/Users/paulo/antigravity/Colaborh---Conectando-Talentos/src/components/CandidateDashboard.tsx)
- `[/]` Implementar a interface do Wizard do MBTI (8 etapas de 8 perguntas, notas de 0 a 3, barra de progresso, validação) na aba "Testes" do [CandidateDashboard.tsx](file:///C:/Users/paulo/antigravity/Colaborh---Conectando-Talentos/src/components/CandidateDashboard.tsx)
- `[x]` Implementar a lógica de cálculo do MBTI (somas das dimensões, desempates e definição do tipo) e persistência no banco em [CandidateDashboard.tsx](file:///C:/Users/paulo/antigravity/Colaborh---Conectando-Talentos/src/components/CandidateDashboard.tsx)
- `[/]` Desenhar o relatório final de autoconhecimento do MBTI para o candidato em [CandidateDashboard.tsx](file:///C:/Users/paulo/antigravity/Colaborh---Conectando-Talentos/src/components/CandidateDashboard.tsx)
- `[/]` Ajustar o card de candidato no Kanban de [CompanyDashboard.tsx](file:///C:/Users/paulo/antigravity/Colaborh---Conectando-Talentos/src/components/CompanyDashboard.tsx) para listar os testes (DISC, Questionário, MBTI) como uma lista vertical minimalista com ações correspondentes
- `[/]` Implementar a função `handleRequestMbtiTest` em [CompanyDashboard.tsx](file:///C:/Users/paulo/antigravity/Colaborh---Conectando-Talentos/src/components/CompanyDashboard.tsx) para solicitar o teste MBTI e enviar e-mail simulado
- `[/]` Criar o modal premium de relatório do MBTI no painel da empr
<truncated 309 bytes>
